query:
SELECT e.id, e.nombre, e.color, e.proyectoId, COUNT(i.id) as item_count 
FROM empresas e 
LEFT JOIN items i ON i.empresaId = e.id 
GROUP BY e.id, e.nombre, e.color, e.proyectoId 
HAVING item_count > 0 
ORDER BY item_count DESC
